focusAreas.label: Information as Entropy
focusAreas.rationale: Exploring the concept of information as a measure of entropy and its implications on learning.

focusAreas.label: Learning and Pattern Recognition
focusAreas.rationale: Investigating how learning is influenced by the ability to recognize patterns under constraints.

focusAreas.label: Cognitive Constraints
focusAreas.rationale: Understanding the impact of cognitive constraints on information extraction and learning.

focusAreas.label: Information Interaction
focusAreas.rationale: Examining the interaction between information and personal constraints in learning.
queries: interaction of information and personal constraints

focusAreas.label: Computation and Learning
focusAreas.rationale: Analyzing how computation can lead to new learning opportunities.
